case_title: CITY HOUSING, INC. VS. WILLIAM GIPSON et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIPSON, WILLIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE #234 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL AUG-15-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT ISSUES FORTHWITH. STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 8/15/03 AT 5:00 P.M. PLAINTFF WAIVES BACK RENT AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES PROVIDED DEFENDANT VACATES TIMELY BY 8/15/03 AT 5:00 P.M. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENTO OF $650.00 AND DAMAGES OF $15.33 PER DAY FROM 6/16/03 THROUGH 8/15/03 WILL BE DUE WITH ALONG WITH COST OF $207.30 FOR TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT OF $1,792.43. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GIPSON, WILLIE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GIPSON, WILLIE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GIPSON, WILLIE AS TO PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-31-2003 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GIPSON, WILLIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GIPSON, WILLIE
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS GIPSON, WILLIAM TO BE GIPSON, WILLIE DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS WILLIE ( SUED AS WILLIAM) GIPSON TO BE GIPSON, WILLIE
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-04-2003 VACATED.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GIPSON, WILLIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-04-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; A SIGNED STIPULATED SETTLEMENT REACHED IN THE CAUSE; TRIAL DATE OF 04AUG2003 VACATED; ARNOLD W. EVJE II APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; DEFENDANT WILLIAM GIPSON APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA. PRO TEM JUDGE: PETER N. HADIARIS; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D206, THURS., 31AUG2003)
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GIPSON, WILLIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GIPSON, WILLIE
